name: Dr. Priya Sharma
bio: Dr. Priya Sharma is a leading child psychologist with over 12 years of experience specialising in autism spectrum disorders. She takes a holistic, family-centred approach to care.

name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
bio: Dr. Arjun Mehta is a developmental pediatrician focused on early identification and intervention for autism. He brings compassion and precision to every consultation.

name: Dr. Sunita Patil
bio: Dr. Sunita Patil specialises in behavioral therapy and communication development for children with ASD. She is known for her warm, child-friendly approach.

name: Dr. Rahul Desai
bio: Dr. Rahul Desai is one of Maharashtra's foremost autism specialists with two decades of experience. He has helped over 2000 families navigate the autism journey.
